name: openblock
description: Open Block — 网页方块益智游戏，经 Flask 将会话与统计持久化到 SQLite

scripts.dev:3000: npm run predev && env VITE_PORT=3000 vite
scripts.dev:80: npm run predev && env VITE_PORT=80 vite
scripts.dev:sudo: npm run predev && sudo -E env PATH="$PATH" VITE_PORT=80 node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js
scripts.mobile:build: npm run build && npm run mobile:sync
scripts.server:rl: env RL_CHECKPOINT_SAVE=rl_checkpoints/bb_policy.pt RL_TRAINING_LOG=rl_checkpoints/training.jsonl RL_SAVE_EVERY=500 RL_DEVICE=auto RL_AUTOLOAD=1 RL_LR=1e-4 RL_GAMMA=0.99 RL_VALUE_COEF=1.0 RL_VALUE_HUBER_BETA=1.0 RL_ENTROPY_COEF=0.025 RL_ENTROPY_COEF_MIN=0.008 RL_ENTROPY_DECAY_EPISODES=60000 RL_RETURN_SCALE=1.0 RL_ADV_NORM=1 RL_ADV_MIN_STD=1e-4 RL_GRAD_CLIP=0.3 RL_PPO_EPOCHS_ONLINE=1 RL_CURRICULUM=1 RL_WIDTH=128 python3 server.py
